# isMember(ofGroup:)

**Instance Method**

Returns a Boolean value indicating whether the identity is a member of the specified group.

## Declaration

```swift
func isMember(ofGroup group: CBGroupIdentity) -> Bool
```

## Parameters

- **group**: The group to check for membership.

## Return Value

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if the identity is a member of the group; [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] if it is not.

## Getting Identity Attributes

- **aliases**: Returns an array of aliases (alternate names) for the identity.
- **authority**: Returns the identity authority where the identity is stored.
- **emailAddress**: Returns the email address of an identity.
- **fullName**: Returns the full name of the identity.
- **image**: Returns the image associated with an identity.
- **isHidden**: Returns a Boolean value indicating the state of the identity’s hidden property.
- **posixName**: Returns the POSIX name of the identity.
- **uuidString**: Returns the UUID of the identity as a string.
